questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to HTTP Protocol?
options: Inefficient scaling of HTTP/1.1 pipelining HOL blocking, HTTP/2 connection multiplexing, and HTTP/3 QUIC UDP migrations.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of HTTP/1.1 pipelining HOL blocking, HTTP/2 connection multiplexing, and HTTP/3 QUIC UDP migrations.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how HTTP/1.1 pipelining HOL blocking, HTTP/2 connection multiplexing, and HTTP/3 QUIC UDP migrations scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
